reasoning: The "List of infectious diseases" Wikipedia page currently leaves the "Vaccine(s)" column blank for Filariasis. Since vaccine development and approval typically takes many years, there is practically a zero percent chance a vaccine will be developed, approved, and then promptly added to the Wikipedia table by February 2026.
